item.title: Backend Learning Plan
item.description: Skills Languages Python Golang Python Frameworks Django Flask FastAPI Golang Frameworks Gin Beego Databases MySQL SQLite PostgreSQL MongoDB ORMs APIs REST GraphQL Containers Docker kubernetes Authentication and Authorization JSON web tokens cookies and sessions OAuth (Google, GitHub) auth libraries (passport, grant) password hashing (bcrypt) protecting endpoints and routes Hosting Platforms DigitalOcean Linode heroku Books ??? Project Ideas see project ideas
